creator: osa@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Alexey,

thanks for the report!

There is no issue with the port here.  There is ports flavors feature has been introduced recently for the port.  So, for now it's possible to build two flavors of the port: "apache" and "nginx".

So, go ahead and try to build the nginx flavor with next command:

% cd /usr/ports/www/rubygem-passenger && make FLAVOR="nginx"

Hope it helps.
